name: Arctic Fox
ability: Each night, you gain the ability of an alive neighbor's (you don't know which) character until dusk.
flavor: Must your claws climb ten-thousand walls? You have come a very long way, sweet thing, but you do not belong here; you will not survive the week. I don't think they can climb ten-thousand more. (v1.5)
firstNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap their character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Arctic Fox might change ability. If so, swap their character token to an alive neighbor's. :reminder:

jinxes.reason: An Arctic Fox with the Spy ability doesn't see the grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Widow ability doesn't see the grimoire.

name: Desperate
ability: You are evil if at least one reminder token is on you & if not, you are good.
flavor: All I have ever wanted was to be noticed; for someone to give even a single damn about me. It should never have had to come to this. It never would have come to this if you, or anyone for that matter!, truly loved me. (v1.3) (token by Diamondwar)

name: Bookkeeper
ability: You can't speak the group's primary language, or might be executed.

name: Imaginary Friend
ability: You don't register as a player. [You want to be the Imaginary Friend the most]
flavor: Do you see it, above you? Reach for it; push your hand into the deep. Feel for it; it is wet and it cuts you and like silver it slivers. Grasp it, no matter how much it shimmers. Cut it like it cut you. (v1.2)

name: Crimson Sister
ability: The 1st time you die, you don't. The 1st time a Minion dies, they live but register as dead.
flavor: Nurture always wins over nature. No one chooses where they come from, they only choose who they become. I will do anything to sever myself from my heritage. (v1.4)

name: Bloodletter
ability: Each night*, good players that choose you with their ability die. [Might be a Minion]
flavor: Trust me, you don't need it as much as I do. (v2.1)

name: Hoary Zorro
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player: they register as the evil Hoary Zorro, even if you are dead.
firstNightReminder: The Hoary Zorro might point to a player. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Hoary Zorro might point to a player. :reminder:

name: Stook
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player & an Outsider: they gain that ability. All players know if you used your ability.
firstNightReminder: The Stook might choose a player & Outsider character. :reminder: Announce that the Stook has used their ability.
otherNightReminder: The Stook might choose a player & Outsider character. :reminder: Announce that the Stook has used their ability.

jinxes.reason: If the Stook gives a player the Damsel ability, the Storyteller chooses which player gains it and that player learns this.
If the Stook gives a player the Saint ability, that player learns this.
If the Stook gives a player the Butler ability, that player learns this.
If the Stook gives a player the Zealot ability, that player learns this.
If a player with the Golem ability (from the Stook) nominates, they learn they have the Golem ability tonight.
If the Stook gives a player the Misheard ability, that player learns this.
Only 1 jinxed character can be in play.

name: Lobotomist
ability: Once per game, at night, choose a player & an ability they have instead. When doing this, the Storyteller may prompt you to choose differently.
firstNightReminder: The Lobotomist might choose a player & an ability. :reminder:
otherNightReminder: The Lobotomist might choose a player & an ability. :reminder:

name: Worm
ability: On your 1st night, look at the Grimoire & choose 2 players: whatever happens to one also happenes to the other.
flavor: Ever since then, I've been able to see things I couldn't before; feel things I could've never imagined. It doesn't feel... good, nor is it painful either; it's something different. I'm not sure why, but I haven't been able to stop crying. (v1.3)
firstNightReminder: Show the Grimoire for as long as the Worm needs. :reminder: :reminder:

jinxes.reason: An Alchemist-Worm does not see the Grimoire.
An Arctic Fox with the Worm ability does not see the Grimoire.
If the Seed is in play, the Worm does not see the Grimoire.

name: Tardigrade
ability: On your 1st night, choose a player: (if not the Demon) you register as their character, alignment & gain their character's ability.
firstNightReminder: The Tardigrade points to a player. If necessary, swap their character token. :reminder: :reminder:

name: Snafu
ability: If the Storyteller makes a mistake, all players know this & the black sliver gets bigger.
flavor: Don't worry about it. Don't worry about it! You really don't need to worry about it. (v1.0)
